title: Immutable directed sequence (.list)
description: A linked list of immutable entries. Items are never mutated or removed — only appended. Array order is the direction: position carries meaning. Supports two uses: append-only log (tracking over time) and ordered ranking (position = rank). Serializes to `- [ ] <message>` / `- [x] <message>`. Each entry carries an optional origin link and traceability links.
